key_risks: Sharp factor rotation or AI/semiconductor de-rating reverses momentum exposures simultaneously
Hawkish FOMC surprise on June 17 hits high-beta growth and EM Asia
Oil price reversal from $95 drags energy allocation
Dollar strength (broad index at 120) pressures Korea/Taiwan returns
Concentrated correlation between SMH, EWY, EWT, and MTUM amplifies drawdowns

portfolio.rationale: Strongest momentum theme (64.8% 6m) backed by AI capex cycle and strong manufacturing PMI; recent 7d pullback offers entry.
Powerful momentum (11.4% 30d, 114% 6m) tied to semiconductor cycle and domestic reform rally.
Semiconductor supply-chain leverage with strong 30d momentum.
Broad momentum factor leading US factors (5.2% 30d, 25% 6m) in a trending market.
WTI at $95 with strong oil momentum and sticky headline inflation; energy equities lag spot oil's 6m run, offering catch-up and inflation hedge.

portfolio_rationale: With the Fed on hold, robust ISM data, soft core CPI, and a strong AI/semiconductor cycle, tilt toward high-momentum tech/semi exposure (SMH, EWY, EWT, MTUM) while energy hedges the high-headline-inflation, $95-oil regime.
rationale_summary: Momentum-led barbell: AI/semiconductor and Korea/Taiwan momentum plus energy as an inflation/oil hedge to beat SPY over one month.
